title: Maba pentamera
taxonomy: Maba pentamera is a species of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae. It is a type of evergreen shrub or small tree native to tropical Asia. The classification of Maba pentamera is primarily based on its botanical characteristics and molecular analysis. Maba pentamera belongs to the genus Maba and is closely related to other species in the same genus. Its classification is subject to ongoing research and revisions in the field of botany.
uses: Maba pentamera is known for its various medicinal uses, particularly in traditional medicine. In traditional medicine, Maba pentamera is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
